data.body:
## Experiment results (default suite, this 18-core Mac, py3.14, selection `-m "not integration and not external"`, 5877 pass / 14 skip / 1 known 3.14-only fail)

| Config | Wall | vs serial | Outcomes |
|---|---|---|---|
| serial + branch-cov (EXACT CI cmd) | 1361s pytest / ~1700s w/ report | 1.0x | 5877P/14S/1F |
| serial, no-cov | 1765s | ~1.0x | 5877P/14S/1F |
| **-n4, no-cov** | **331s** | **5.3x** | 5877P/14S/1F (identical) |
| **-n4 + branch-cov** | **351s** | **5.0x** | identical (cov = +6%) |
| -n4 + cov + sysmon | 365s | — | no win (IO-bound; sysmon irrelevant) |
| -n auto(18), no-cov | 218s | 8.1x | identical |
| -n auto(18) + cov + sysmon | 254s | — | rc=3 coverage SQLite race (NOT isolation) |

### Proven conclusions
1. **xdist is THE lever & is isolation-safe.** -n4 gives 5x and produces byte-identical outcomes to serial (same 5877P/14S/1F). Autouse isolation fixtures (per-test tmp_path/XDG/monkeypatch/config-cache) hold under parallel workers; zero spurious repo-leak/socket-guard/repo-HEAD failures.
2. **Coverage overhead is negligible (~6% at -n4, ~0 serial) — KEEP coverage on the gate.** Suite is subprocess/git/IO-bound, not line-exec bound, so settrace tax is small. Dropping coverage buys ~nothing and loses assurance.
3. **Use -n <real-cores>, NOT -n auto.** 18 workers over-subscribes and triggers a coverage.py SQLite-combine race. Pin -n4 (ubuntu 4-vCPU) / -n3 (macos arm).
4. **Slowest tests are legitimate integration** (real opengrep/gitleaks/ast-grep scans, real subprocess-timeout reaping, e2e Node/browser) — best handled by parallelism, not per-test surgery. The 20s outlier is branch-coverage tracing a first heavy import.

### CI structural findings (gerrit-verify.yaml)
- Test step runs SERIAL (no xdist) — the dominant cost (~22min/cell).
- No pip caching in ANY job → heavy .[dev]/[agents] install rebuilt every job/cell.
- Platform-independent gates (10 drift gates, make lint, pre-commit, make typecheck, config-check) run in ALL 4 matrix cells (test.yml factors them into ONE lint job).
- ruff runs 2x/cell + mypy runs 2x/cell (make lint + pre-commit[lint+typecheck] + make typecheck) → 8x each across matrix.
- require-ticket serialized in front of build-and-test (adds its own checkout+install latency to the critical path; only needs to gate the vote).
